name: Five Field Kono
author: Traditional (Korea) / AGP port
description: Five Field Kono (오뱭고누), a traditional Korean racing game on a 5x5 grid of points. Each side has 7 pieces (the whole back row plus the two outer points of the second row). A piece moves one step diagonally to an adjacent empty point - there are no captures. The first player to move ALL of their pieces onto the opponent's starting points wins. A no-progress ply cap yields a draw. (Korean: 오밭고누 / 오밭고노)
